scripts.autofix: pnpm lint:fix && pnpm format && pnpm typecheck
scripts.dev: node scripts/write-build-info.ts && cross-env SLINT_ENABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_FEATURES=1  node src/main.ts
scripts.dev:debug: node scripts/write-build-info.ts && cross-env GH_DEBUG_JSON=1 GH_DEBUG_SKIP_SLINT_UI_PROJECT_DUMPS=1 node src/main.ts
scripts.dev:debug:projects: node scripts/write-build-info.ts && cross-env GH_DEBUG_JSON=1 SLINT_ENABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_FEATURES=1 node src/main.ts
